ogTitle: Kawl Kawl vs Kearneys Spring: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kawl Kawl and Kearneys Spring.
heading: Kawl Kawl vs Kearneys Spring — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kawl Kawl, Queensland and Kearneys Spring, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kearneys Spring has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kawl Kawl (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kawl Kawl or Kearneys Spring safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kawl Kawl has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Kearneys Spring scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kawl Kawl scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Kearneys Spring scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kawl Kawl or Kearneys Spring?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kearneys Spring has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
